title: Registered voters in Hawaii should receive a mail ballot and secrecy sleeve by July 23.
shortDescription: Registered voters in Hawaii should receive a mail ballot and secrecy sleeve by July 23.

title: How will history remember President Joe Biden? | The Excerpt
shortDescription: What led to his unprecedented decision to bow out of the presidential race and what will his legacy be?

title: Video of profane Biden speech is fabricated | Fact check
shortDescription: The video is a fabrication that was first posted to X, formerly Twitter, by a social media user who shares memes and other manipulated content.

title: Netanyahu pays visit to Trump at Mar-a-Lago
shortDescription: It was the first meeting between the leaders since former President Donald Trump left the White House in 2021.

title: Voters register en masse after Harris enters the race
shortDescription: The last two weeks of campaign drama, including Kamala Harris joining the race, have inspired Gen Z and millennial voters to register in huge numbers.

title: Can Harris beat Trump? Presidential predictor makes his early pick.
shortDescription: Allan Lichtman said his final prediction for the White House contest will come in August. But as of Friday, his data says Kamala Harris will win.

title: Trump refuses to commit to any debates until after Harris is nominated
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is refusing to commit to any general election debates until after Democrats decide on their nominee at the convention.

title: Man arrested for threats, saying Trump 'needs to die': Reports
shortDescription: After a 58-year-old man was arrested in Nashville over alleged threats on the life of former President Donald Trump, police informed Secret Service.

title: Massive new alliance of voters look to give Kamala Harris a boost
shortDescription: Strength in numbers as 17 youth voter organizations join forces to help elect Kamala Harris as president.

title: What to know about the GOP politics at Nashville's Bitcoin conference
shortDescription: As the Bitcoin2024 conference kicked off in Nashville’s Music City Center Thursday, attendees agreed: Cryptocurrency is political.

title: Harris pushes Netanyahu to end war in Gaza | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: How the age question has flipped in the presidential election. | Most violent crimes in U.S. cities are back down to pre-pandemic levels.

title: The script flips: Now Trump faces critical questions before election
shortDescription: Donald Trump badgered Joe Biden for months with questions about his age, physical health and mental acuity. Now it’s Trump who is being taunted.

title: Nikki Haley criticizes GOP attacks on Harris over race as 'not helpful'
shortDescription: The former GOP presidential candidate urged other Republicans to focus on Kamala Harris' policy platform, not her identity.
